next_steps: Perform transthoracic echocardiogram to assess wall motion abnormalities and ejection fraction
Perform cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (cMRI) to evaluate for myocardial inflammation or fibrosis
Order serologic testing for Borrelia burgdorferi (Lyme disease), including IgM and IgG Western blot
Order serologic testing for Q fever (Coxiella burnetii) given the history of sheep and animal liver extract consumption
Perform continuous cardiac telemetry monitoring to characterize the rhythm and degree of heart block
Maintain high suspicion for Lyme carditis and consider empiric antibiotic therapy if clinical suspicion is high while awaiting diagnostic results
Perform autoimmune and rheumatologic serological panel including ANA and ENA
